Short CV

Born in 1973, And Algül received his bachelor's degree from Bilkent University, his master's degree from Marmara University, and his doctorate degree from Yeditepe University. Algül, who works as a faculty member at Üsküdar University, Faculty of Communication, Department of Visual Communication Design, conducts research on virtual reality, information society, surveillance society, technological determinism, social media, new media, interaction, design, digital media, digital games, communication tools and media studies.
